responses: Hello! Welcome to Student Support Chatbot.
Hi! How can I help you today?
Hello! Ask me anything about college.
Please check your attendance from the student portal.
Your attendance details are available on the college portal.
The exam schedule will be announced by the college.
Please check the notice board or college website for exam dates.
You can pay your fees through the college portal.
Please contact the accounts department for fee-related queries.
The library is open from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
You can issue books using your student ID.
